description: ProviderAuthError 的 message 恰好包含 'file part media type' 子串——不应判为 Poison

data.message: Authentication failed: the file part media type in your request is not supported by your current plan

description: ContextOverflowError 的 message 恰好包含 'tool choice type'——不应判为 Poison

data.message: Context overflow: tool choice type auto increased token usage beyond limit

description: StructuredOutputError 但 message 不含 poison pattern——不应判为 Poison

data.message: Model did not produce structured output after 3 retries

description: StructuredOutputError 但 message 是其他内容——不应判为 Poison

data.message: Output validation failed: missing required field 'result'

description: UnknownError 但 message 不含 model 模式——应判 UnknownUpstream

data.message: Rate limit exceeded, please try again later

description: 纯字符串抛出物——应判 UnknownUpstream
普通对象无 name 字段——应判 UnknownUpstream
APIError 但 message 不含 poison pattern——不应判为 Poison
UnknownError 同时含 model pattern 和 poison pattern——model 优先级高于 poison

data.message: model not found: file part media type unsupported

description: 循环引用对象——应判 UnknownUpstream 不崩溃
